items.title: Hollinger POTD Antawn Jamison. UNC SF was drafted 4th by TOR & immediately traded to GS. Struggled as rook but became deadly scorer, tho D wasn't strong. Peaked at 24.9 ppg in 00-01. Most efficient as 6th man for 03-04 DAL. Also had nice run for WAS. Retired in 2014 at age 37.

items.title: 4 straight thrillers in the NBA Finals 🍿
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
4 straight thrillers in the NBA Finals 🍿

Brunson and OG sparked New York's historic 29-point comeback in Game 4 (largest in Finals history) to take a 3-1 lead. Back at home, will the Spurs force a Game 6 or will the Knicks close out the series and secure their first title since 1973?
